ShortDescription.Value: Limits total time transit waits at stops; tardy passengers can miss the vehicle instead of causing endless boarding.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Faster Boarding [Beta]
Safer public transit boarding tweaks. move more people by transit, reduce blocked stops, reduce private car demand indirectly Instead of replacing the transportAIsystems, this build focuses on two smaller behaviors:
- **Prefab stop tuning** for road, rail, water, and air transit - **Optional late-boarder cancellation** so passengers can miss a vehicle instead of holding it forever
### What the sliders do
Tune boarding speeds for:
- Bus - Rail (train, tram, subway) - Water (ship, ferry) - Air
Higher values shorten dwell time by increasing stop loading speed and adjusting the boarding-time estimate used by the game.
### Optional experimental behavior
When **Cancel Late Boarders** is enabled, passengers who are still not ready after departure time can be dropped from that vehicle's boarding process. The goal is for the vehicle to leave and for those passengers to wait for the next one instead of blocking the line.
### Notes
- This is intended to be a lighter approach than replacing the vanilla transport AI systems. - Group boarding is handled conservatively to avoid splitting groups across platform and vehicle. - Safe to remove anytime. - No Harmony patches.
### Credits - RiverMochi (mod author) - Inspiration and thanks to bcallender's All Aboard mod.
Publish.ChangeLog: - Reworked the mod into a standard CS2 Mod.cs + Setting.cs + LocaleEN.cs layout - Added per-family boarding speed sliders for bus, rail, water, and air - Added optional experimental late-boarder cancellation - Restored required publish configuration structure and publish profile files
